executiveSummary: All 10 functional requirements and 6 user stories for iteration 000030 (WAN 2.1 video pipelines) are fully implemented and compliant. The empty_wan_latent_video helper, all three wan21 pipeline modules (t2v, i2v, flf2v), the sub-package wiring, and the three example scripts are present with correct signatures, __all__ exports, lazy-import patterns, and CLI argument definitions.
minorObservations: i2v.py and flf2v.py type-annotate image parameters as `str | Path | Any` rather than the more precise `str | Path | PIL.Image.Image`; functionally equivalent but less expressive in IDEs.
No unit tests cover the new empty_wan_latent_video function or the manifest() calls — acceptable per project convention (critical paths only, GPU not available in CI), but worth noting.
The wan21 pipelines use HFModelEntry (Hugging Face) exclusively; inline documentation could clarify that local-path overrides are not yet supported for these models.
Example scripts were initially placed at examples/video_wan21_*.py instead of examples/video/wan/wan21/*.py — corrected to match the LTX directory pattern.
conclusionsAndRecommendations: The implementation is complete and correct. All acceptance criteria are satisfied. The three minor observations are non-blocking style/documentation items. Recommended next step is the Refactor phase to: (1) tighten the image parameter type annotations from Any to PIL.Image.Image, (2) add at least one pytest smoke-test for empty_wan_latent_video (CPU-safe), and (3) add a brief docstring to each pipeline's run() explaining the HF-only model resolution.
